brief.speaker: gladys
brief.text: Here's my schedule, kid. Show me every shift in order, earliest first. Let me see the rhythm of the place before we go looking for what's wrong.

expected.sql: SELECT staff_name, shift_date FROM shifts ORDER BY shift_date ASC

hints.text: Gladys: 'Order's off. Check which column you're sorting by and which direction.'
Gladys: 'SQL spat an error. Both slots need to be filled before you can run.'
Gladys: 'Ascending means earliest first. Which column has the dates?'

success.speaker: gladys
success.text: That's the rhythm. Louise, Frank, Mavis, Esther. Every few nights. A tight little crew.
